<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band05_chunk004.pdf#page=5 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band05 p158 -->

KREUZHOLZHAUSEN


[[File:Band05_chunk004_p005_img001.jpg|thumb|B Zweite Vision des Kaisers Konstantin]]


[[File:Band05_chunk004_p005_img002.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band05 p159 -->
